task_completion.description: Navigate to the log import or custom log parser section in EventLog Analyzer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the EventLog Analyzer interface with the 'Import Log Data', 'Log Import', or 'Custom Log' creation screen open.

task_completion.description: Select the correct CSV file for import
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file path '/home/ga/Documents/payroll_logs.csv' or the file 'payroll_logs.csv' is visible in the file upload/selection input field.

task_completion.description: Map the 'Date' column to the Timestamp field with the correct format
task_completion.visual_evidence: The field mapping interface shows the 'Date' column mapped to a 'Timestamp' or 'Time' field, with the date format explicitly set to 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'.

task_completion.description: Map the 'Host' column to the Source/Device field
task_completion.visual_evidence: The field mapping interface shows the 'Host' column from the CSV mapped to the 'Source', 'Device', or 'Host' field in the application.

task_completion.description: Map the 'Severity' and 'Message' columns to their respective fields
task_completion.visual_evidence: The field mapping interface shows the 'Severity' column mapped to the 'Severity' field, and the 'Message' column mapped to the 'Message' field.

task_completion.description: Ensure the logs are successfully imported and indexed
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the file was imported/indexed successfully (showing at least 3 records), OR the log search/view screen displaying the newly imported logs (look for host 'PAYROLL-DB' and message 'Database connection lost during batch processing').

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to perform the import
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the EventLog Analyzer web interface in a browser, rather than using curl commands or API scripts in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface displays authentic ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer branding, menus, and layout, not a text editor or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent imported the file rather than manually typing log entries
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using the file upload/import workflow rather than manually typing the expected log messages into a search bar or custom event creator.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The CSV file to be imported is located at /home/ga/Documents/payroll_logs.csv. The imported logs will have the host 'PAYROLL-DB'. To verify successful indexing, look for at least 3 imported events, specifically checking for an entry with severity 'ERROR' and the message 'Database connection lost during batch processing'.
